notes: Phase 1 / Tier 14 list (Mogu'shan Vaults, Heart of Fear, Terrace of Endless Spring — Heroic versions). Tier token bosses: helm = Sha of Fear, shoulders = Lei Shi, chest = Grand Empress Shek'zeer, hands = Wind Lord Mel'jarak, legs = Amber-Shaper Un'sok. Cat DPS list — four-piece Eternal Blossom (feral pieces) with Gao-Rei, Staff of the Legendary Protector; Relic of Xuen is the Darkmoon agility trinket. Draft compiled from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Feral Druid gear guide (Phase 1 table).
